headline: Expanding Customer Base and Investments Support LNT's Growth
summary: Alliant Energy's regulated model, data center load growth and $13.4B investment plan support demand, clean energy expansion and long-term growth.

raw.headline: Expanding Customer Base and Investments Support LNT's Growth

headline: Is Alliant Energy Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
summary: Alliant Energy has underperformed the S&P 500 Index over the past year, but analysts are reasonably upbeat about the stock’s prospects.
